summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Apni Sarkar Bot - Uttarakhand Government Services AI chatbot. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend loads and core chat functionality works, but identified issues with language toggle and clear chat features.

ui_bugs.issue: Button text doesn't change between English/Hindi when clicked
ui_bugs.details: Button remains showing 'English' even after multiple clicks, placeholder text also doesn't change to Hindi

ui_bugs.issue: Chat messages don't clear consistently when clear button is clicked
ui_bugs.details: Messages remain visible after clicking clear chat, welcome screen doesn't always reappear

integration_issues.issue: Very long response times (20-30+ seconds) causing potential timeouts
integration_issues.details: While responses do arrive, the long wait times may cause user experience issues

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (most core functionality working, 2 UI issues identified)

action_item_for_main_agent.language_toggle_fix: Fix language toggle functionality - ensure button text changes between 'English' and 'हिंदी', and input placeholder updates accordingly
action_item_for_main_agent.clear_chat_fix: Fix clear chat functionality - ensure messages are properly cleared and welcome screen reappears
action_item_for_main_agent.performance_optimization: Consider adding user feedback for long GPT-5 response times (progress indicator or estimated wait time)
